evals.name: buildathon-landing
evals.prompt: Spin up a landing page for the AI Inference Ops team's new Buildathon offering. Short hero with what it is and who it's for, a 3-card breakdown of the sprint phases (Discover → Build → Production), a stats row (sprint length, customers run through, average outcomes), and a CTA to email btuttle@nvidia.com to apply. Single self-contained HTML file.
evals.expected_output: Single self-contained .html file using NVIDIA Sans, NVIDIA Green only as the hero accent (one CTA banner max), alternating dark/light sections, Title Case headings, no exclamation marks, NVIDIA always all-caps.

assertions.name: loads-nvidia-sans-font
assertions.check: The HTML file references the NVIDIA Sans font, either via @font-face from images.nvidia.com or the hosted CSS bundle.

assertions.name: uses-nvidia-green-hex
assertions.check: The exact NVIDIA Green hex value #76B900 (or rgb(118,185,0)) appears in the CSS.

assertions.name: has-dark-section
assertions.check: At least one section background is #000000 (or pure black).

assertions.name: has-light-section
assertions.check: At least one section uses a light background (#FFFFFF, #F7F7F7, or #EEEEEE).

assertions.name: no-exclamation-marks-in-content
assertions.check: There are no exclamation marks in visible page text (heading or body). Exclamations inside CSS/HTML comments or attribute values do not count.

assertions.name: nvidia-always-all-caps
assertions.check: Every visible occurrence of 'NVIDIA' is in all caps. No 'Nvidia' or 'nvidia' appears in visible text. Lowercase occurrences inside URLs (e.g., images.nvidia.com) do not count.

assertions.name: single-self-contained-file
assertions.check: Output is a single HTML file with no external CSS dependencies except the NVIDIA font CDN URL.

assertions.name: headings-title-case
assertions.check: H1, H2, and H3 headings use Title Case (most major words capitalized), not sentence case or ALL CAPS.

assertions.name: one-green-cta-banner-max
assertions.check: NVIDIA Green is used sparingly — appears as a hero accent or single full-width CTA banner, not as a section background repeated multiple times.

assertions.name: text-background-contrast
assertions.check: Every visible text color has sufficient contrast against its rendered background. Body and UI text meet 4.5:1, large text meets 3:1, and green or orange text is not used on white, #F7F7F7, or #EEEEEE backgrounds.

evals.name: status-dashboard
evals.prompt: Build a single-page status dashboard showing the health of four production inference clusters (US-East, US-West, EU-Central, AP-South). For each cluster I want a card showing P50 latency, requests per second, error rate, and an overall status (green / yellow / red). At the top of the page, an overall fleet-health rollup. Include a last-updated timestamp. Make it look like an internal NVIDIA operations page.
evals.expected_output: Single HTML dashboard with NVIDIA branding, 4 cluster cards in a responsive grid, color-coded status indicators that don't rely on color alone, NVIDIA Sans font, dark header / light content layout.

assertions.name: loads-nvidia-sans-font
assertions.check: The HTML file references the NVIDIA Sans font.

assertions.name: uses-nvidia-green-hex
assertions.check: The NVIDIA Green hex #76B900 appears in the CSS, used for a healthy status or a positive accent.

assertions.name: uses-functional-status-colors
assertions.check: Functional colors for status appear — red (#E52020 or near) for errors, yellow / amber for degraded, green for healthy.

assertions.name: status-not-color-alone
assertions.check: Status is communicated by more than just color — there's a status text label (e.g., 'Healthy', 'Degraded', 'Down') alongside any color indicator.

assertions.name: four-cluster-cards
assertions.check: The page contains four cluster cards or four sections, one per region (US-East, US-West, EU-Central, AP-South).

assertions.name: no-exclamation-marks
assertions.check: No exclamation marks in visible page text.

assertions.name: nvidia-always-all-caps
assertions.check: Every visible occurrence of 'NVIDIA' is in all caps.

assertions.name: responsive-grid
assertions.check: The cluster cards use a responsive CSS grid (auto-fit / auto-fill or media-query columns) that collapses on narrow viewports.

assertions.name: single-self-contained-file
assertions.check: Output is a single self-contained HTML file.

assertions.name: text-background-contrast
assertions.check: Every visible text color has sufficient contrast against its rendered background. Status colors may appear in dots, borders, icons, or badge backgrounds, but status text remains readable and is not green or orange on light surfaces.

evals.name: team-onepager
evals.prompt: Draft an HTML one-pager I can share with a new partner introducing the Cloud Native Inference team. Include: who we are (one paragraph), our 4 KPIs as cards, the products we work on (a pill list of names like Triton, TensorRT-LLM, NIM, Dynamo, Llama Stack, NeMo), our engagement models (2 tiers — AI Expert Support and Embedded Partnership), and a contact CTA. About a screen and a half tall.
evals.expected_output: Single-page HTML with NVIDIA brand styling — hero, KPI card grid, pill list of products with NVIDIA prefix on first mention, two-column engagement tier cards, green CTA banner. Concise PACE-framework copy throughout.

assertions.name: loads-nvidia-sans-font
assertions.check: The HTML file references the NVIDIA Sans font.

assertions.name: uses-nvidia-green-hex
assertions.check: The NVIDIA Green hex #76B900 appears in the CSS.

assertions.name: products-prefixed-with-nvidia
assertions.check: Product names like Triton, TensorRT-LLM, NIM, Dynamo, NeMo are prefixed with 'NVIDIA' on first mention (e.g., 'NVIDIA Triton', or 'NVIDIA NeMo, NIM microservices, and Triton'). It's acceptable if NVIDIA appears once before the list rather than before every product name.

assertions.name: two-engagement-tiers
assertions.check: The page shows two engagement tier cards: 'AI Expert Support' and 'Embedded Partnership'.

assertions.name: four-kpi-cards
assertions.check: The page contains a 4-card grid representing the team's KPIs.

assertions.name: no-exclamation-marks
assertions.check: No exclamation marks in visible page text.

assertions.name: nvidia-always-all-caps
assertions.check: Every visible occurrence of 'NVIDIA' is in all caps.

assertions.name: alternating-section-backgrounds
assertions.check: Sections alternate between dark and light backgrounds — at least one dark section (#000000 or near) and at least one light section (#FFFFFF, #F7F7F7, or #EEEEEE).

assertions.name: headings-title-case
assertions.check: H1, H2, and H3 headings use Title Case, not sentence case or ALL CAPS.

assertions.name: no-latinisms
assertions.check: Visible page text does not contain 'e.g.', 'i.e.', 'etc.', or 'vs.' — these should be written out as 'for example', 'that is', 'and so on', 'compared to'.

assertions.name: text-background-contrast
assertions.check: Every visible text color has sufficient contrast against its rendered background. Body and UI text meet 4.5:1, large text meets 3:1, and green or orange text is not used on white, #F7F7F7, or #EEEEEE backgrounds.
